regulation_name: CPCB Emission Standards Phase III — Thermal Power
summary: NOx limit reduced to 100 mg/Nm3 for plants >500 MW; SOx limit at 200 mg/Nm3; all plants must comply within 36 months
thermax_impact: Direct demand for FGD and SCR/SNCR retrofits — Thermax core portfolio
action_required: Prepare retrofit proposals for top 20 thermal utilities

regulation_name: Zero Liquid Discharge Mandate — Textile Parks
summary: All textile clusters in Tamil Nadu and Gujarat must achieve ZLD by July 2027; ₹500 Cr penalty framework announced
thermax_impact: High demand for Thermax ZLD and water recycling systems
action_required: Engage textile cluster associations in Tirupur and Surat

summary: Updated IS 2825 standard requiring higher safety margins and mandatory IBR certification for all new boiler installations
thermax_impact: Thermax boilers already compliant; opportunity to capture share from non-compliant competitors
action_required: Update marketing materials highlighting Thermax IBR compliance

regulation_name: Saudi Arabia Net Zero 2060 — Industrial Emission Caps
summary: Phase 1 emission caps for refineries and petrochemical complexes; carbon intensity reduction targets of 15% by 2030
thermax_impact: Opportunity for Thermax energy efficiency and waste heat solutions in Saudi industrial sector
action_required: Coordinate with Thermax Middle East office for proposal preparation

regulation_name: EU CBAM — Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism Phase 2
summary: Reporting phase complete; actual carbon tariffs begin Oct 2026; Indian exporters must demonstrate carbon intensity metrics
thermax_impact: Indian steel and cement exporters need energy efficiency upgrades to remain competitive in EU markets
action_required: Target Indian steel and cement exporters with energy audit and efficiency solutions

summary: All industries consuming >500 KLD must recycle 50% of wastewater by 2027; monitoring via IoT meters mandatory
thermax_impact: Thermax water treatment and recycling systems directly applicable; chemical division for water chemistry
action_required: Prepare bundled water treatment + chemical solutions for Maharashtra industrial estates
